title: Verify MCP server integration implementation
description: Verify that MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers are already implemented in @kody-ade/engine and correctly configured in kody.config.json. All acceptance criteria are met by the existing engine implementation: buildMcpConfigJson() generates valid MCP JSON, isMcpEnabledForStage() gates to build/verify/review stages, withPlaywrightIfNeeded() auto-injects Playwright for UI tasks, pipeline passes mcpConfigJson to agent runner, and log output shows 'MCP servers enabled for {stage}'.
existing_patterns: node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/mcp-config.js:buildMcpConfigJson() - generates Claude Code MCP config JSON from kody.config.json mcp settings
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/mcp-config.js:isMcpEnabledForStage() - gates MCP to build/verify/review stages via config.mcp.stages
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/stages/agent.js:78-84 - passes mcpConfigJson to runner.run() and logs 'MCP servers enabled for {stage}'
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/kody.config.schema.json:208-249 - JSON schema defining mcp.enabled, mcp.servers, mcp.stages configuration
